Author: Akari
Name: Venue Helper
Punchline: An all-in-one toolkit for FFXIV venue hosts: attendance, raffles, auctions, giveaways, deathroll tournaments, bar games, menus, and quick announcements.
Description: An all-in-one venue host toolkit: Venue Counter (multi-venue attendance + lifetime time tracking), Raffle Helper, Auction Helper (gil shorthand + buyer tracking), Giveaway Helper (anti-cheat), DR Tourny Helper (single or double elimination), Shout/Yell Helper, Bar Game Helper (custom + survival games, fixed/tiered/high-score payouts), Menu Helper (per-venue menus, macro serve sequences), plus a Settings tab with backup/restore and a master panic switch. Open with /venuehelper (aliases /vhelp, /vh). Exports to TXT, CSV, PDF, or XLSX.

Author: Akari
Name: FC Tracker
Punchline: Track your characters' Free Companies: level, tag, credits, house, and workshop vessels.
Description: Records, per character, the Free Company you belong to: name, tag, level, current master, member counts, FC credits, house ownership (district/ward/plot/world), and workshop airships & submersibles with build shorthand. Sortable table with click-to-expand details, a First Registered date, editable founder/house-winner notes, optional shared storage across all clients, and import from AutoRetainer and Submarine Tracker. Open with /fctracker (alias /fct).

Author: Akari
Name: Housing Lotto Tracker
Punchline: Track your housing lottery bids: plot, world, entry number, results date, win/loss.
Description: Passively records every housing lottery bid you place, per character, by reading the placard when you interact with it. One row per bid: character/world, region, district, ward, plot, size, FC-vs-personal, entry date, results-available date with live countdown, and outcome (Pending/Won/Lost). Auto-captures placard data during entry and results periods; auto-detects wins via the results SelectYesno; entry number is grabbed when shown and editable otherwise. Sortable table with click-to-expand details, per-column toggles, editable notes, and optional shared storage across all clients. Open with /hlt (alias /lotto).
